name: Pumpkin Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda and salt; set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine pumpkin, brown sugar, slightly beaten egg, milk, oil, oats and raisins. Blend well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients in three additions, stirring just enough to moisten after each addition.
4. Spoon batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
5. Sprinkle crumb topping over the batter.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
CRUMB TOPPING:
1. In a bowl, combine 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, 1/2 cup unbleached flour, 1 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice and 2 tablespoons butter or regular margarine.
2. Mix until crumbly.
